description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines four jobs (Debian, Fedora, Mint, Ubuntu) each using its respective Docker image (debian:latest, fedora:latest, vcatechnology/linux-mint:latest, ubuntu:latest) and running in the default stage. All jobs generate artifacts that expire in 2 weeks and include the paths build/pdf/* and build/*.zip. The Debian, Mint, and Ubuntu jobs each execute: export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive; apt-get -y update; apt-get -y install pandoc make zip; apt-get install -y texlive-xetex; make zip. The Fedora job executes: dnf -y update && dnf clean all; dnf -y install texlive-collection-latexextra texlive-collection-basic; dnf -y install texlive-collection-latexrecommended make zip pandoc; dnf -y install texlive-collection-bibtexextra texlive-collection-latex; dnf -y install texlive-xetex-def texlive-collection-xetex texlive-xetex; make zip. No caches, services, or conditional rules are defined.
